title: Add ability to define the range of the Number column

posts.author: PeterCS (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When using the number column it is often needed to limit the values users can input. For example if I want a percentage the value should be limited to 0-100
Therefore this feature request is to add the ability to define the allowed range of numbers in a numbers column (between, smaller than, greater than)

What are you trying to achieve

Limit the range of numbers allowed in a numbers column
